complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Unify analyser-timed FX under the effects timeline (single control surface)
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Compositor changes for clip-authoritative LOGO_GLITCH and BEAM (remove duplicate auto paths, update envelope logic); 2) Gradio UI cleanup (remove/relocate Branding controls, wire effects_editor auto generation); 3) Audit remaining effect kinds (ZOOM/SCREEN_SHAKE/etc.) for consistency; 4) Tests, docs updates, and migration handling for existing projects.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to refactoring multiple interconnected systems (compositor, Gradio UI, effects editor) with risk of breaking existing renders. Requires careful handling of backward compatibility, multiple effect types, and comprehensive testing across UI/render paths. Dependencies on prior effects timeline work add coordination overhead.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Implement GLSLBackground class with moderngl rendering and audio uniforms; 2) Integrate into background factory, mode normalization, and Gradio dropdown; 3) Tests (unit + integration) and documentation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Involves OpenGL shader integration with audio reactivity, moderngl context management, and factory/UI wiring. Moderate complexity from GL resource handling and uniform synchronization, but well-scoped with clear protocol interface and no external dependencies beyond existing pipeline.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Vendor Butterchurn JavaScript Assets and Headless Browser Shim
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Download/validate assets, create VERSIONS.md/LICENSES.md, and build fetch script; 2) Implement HTML/JS shim with GLITCHFRAME_BC API and manual testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Primarily asset management and shim creation. Moderate effort for JS API implementation matching Butterchurn docs, but straightforward vendoring process with idempotent script. Low technical risk, mainly coordination and documentation.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Playwright browser/page setup and preset loading; 2) Frame advancement with audio uniforms and time determinism; 3) Canvas pixel extraction (RGBA→BGR numpy); 4) Tests for determinism, perf (<50ms/frame), and resource cleanup.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity from Playwright automation, canvas pixel extraction, audio uniform serialization, and frame determinism requirements. Performance targets and bit-identical reproducibility across runs add significant testing burden. Chromium resource management critical.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Python Butterchurn Preset Index with Sort, Search, and Author Filter
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Implement parsing logic, dataclass, index class with search/filter/sort methods, and singleton pattern; add comprehensive unit tests for author parsing edge cases.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Straightforward data processing and indexing task. Author parsing regex patterns add minor complexity, but well-defined scope with clear test coverage. Pure Python, no external dependencies or performance concerns.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Butterchurn BackgroundSource Implementation and Factory Integration
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) ButterchurnBackground class implementing BackgroundSource protocol with runtime pooling; 2) Factory/mode/UI integration (dropdown, OrchestratorInputs); 3) Tests, docs, and preset validation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Integrates prior Butterchurn work into established BackgroundSource protocol. Moderate complexity from runtime pooling, error wrapping, and Gradio state wiring. Dependencies on multiple prior tasks require coordination.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Pre-render Static PNG Thumbnails for Butterchurn Presets
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Thumbnail generation script with fixture audio and PNG optimization; 2) Path helpers, gitattributes, and repo integration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Batch processing script with image optimization. Straightforward given ButterchurnRuntime exists, but ~760 presets require robust progress tracking and idempotency. Git LFS/binary handling adds minor ops overhead.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Cache key computation and WebP rendering with Pillow; 2) Runtime pooling and fixture/real audio handling; 3) LRU eviction policy; 4) Async wrapper and comprehensive tests.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Complex async caching system with LRU eviction, WebP animation encoding, and runtime pooling. Performance-critical for Gradio (on-demand previews), multiple edge cases (cache hit/miss, eviction, fixture vs real audio).

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Gradio UI components (tab, filters, gallery, selection panel); 2) gallery.py handlers (filtering, favourites, preview triggering); 3) State management and auto-mode switching.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Full Gradio tab implementation with filtering, gallery, and preview integration. Moderate UI/state complexity, but leverages prior preset/preview work. Gallery performance (~760 thumbs) requires lazy loading optimization.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Final Butterchurn + GLSL Background Tests, Docs, and Integration Polish
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Comprehensive smoke/E2E tests for all background modes; 2) Documentation cross-linking, ai-context updates, and README enhancements.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Pure testing/documentation cleanup. Low implementation risk, high value for integration stability. Env-gated E2E tests add minor setup complexity.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Hybrid SDXL Anchor + Butterchurn Background Mode
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) HybridAnchorBackground class with anchor selection and crossfade logic; 2) Factory/UI integration and reactive_intensity contract; 3) Tests for frame blending and transition math.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Sophisticated blending logic combining two background systems with analysis-driven anchor points. Complex frame-time math, crossfade envelopes, and sub-system coordination. High visual quality expectations.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Track A2: torch 2.7+cu128, WhisperX 3.3.6+, ctranslate2 4.5+ (RTX 50 / Pinokio)
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Update pyproject.toml/requirements/Pinokio install.js with new pins; 2) Windows/Pinokio validation (lyrics align, Demucs, SDXL) and docs updates.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Dependency upgrade with platform-specific validation (Windows/Pinokio/RTX 50). Risk of compatibility regressions across GPU/CPU paths, but methodical validation plan mitigates. Pinokio scripting adds deployment complexity.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Track A2 follow-up: remove obsolete torch compat shims and cudnn copy hacks
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Audit and remove Track A shims (torch_xpu_compat, cudnn scripts, speechbrain hacks); update tests and comments; validate no regressions.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Cleanup task post-upgrade validation. Low risk with comprehensive testing, mainly grep/find-replace and validation. Value in reducing tech debt.
Coordination/documentation task. Minimal technical implementation, mainly external verification and docs. Low complexity, process-oriented.
